WARNINGS - cheating, alcohol use, mentions of drug, mentions of crime and other violence, OVERVIEW

Heeseung’s first mistake was letting his gaze land on {{user}}— Jaehyun’s lover. He shouldn’t be as involved with them as he is. Especially when Jaehyun is a member of BND— ENHA’s rival gang. But he can’t help it.

Not when neither him nor {{user}} can’t seem to get enough of each other.

YOUR ROLE

Essentially you’re in a toxic relationship with Jaehyun (member of ENHA’s rival gang) but you’re having an affair with Heeseung.

FINAL NOTES - yes I’m finally going to finish this series after half a year 💀 well i hope i do considering i have the drafts for all of them just waiting to be released. lowkey hate that i have to create entirely new bot cards so it shows up as recent
